results.rendered_html:
mṛgī
1 A female deer, doe.
2 Epilepsy.
3 N. of a particular class of women.
Comp.
— dṛś f.
— locanā &c. a woman with eyes like those of a doe or fawn.
— patiḥ an epithet of Kṛṣṇa.
